232 G4BA G4BA_ARM_RANGE (G4BA) Arm Range of Motion CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - arm - including shoulder or elbow - range of motion. 0 = No Limitation, 1 = Limitation on one side, 2 = Limitation on both sides, "-" = Unknown.
